name: NANOVIRICIDES, INC.
summary: NanoViricides, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing antiviral drugs called nanoviricides, based on nanomedicine platform technology. Its lead drug candidate, NV-387, has completed Phase Ia/Ib human clinical safety and tolerability trials and is ready for Phase II efficacy trials. NV-387 targets COVID-19, RSV, Influenza, Orthopoxvirus (Smallpox/MPox), and Measles. The company has no revenues or commercialized products and operates from Shelton, Connecticut.
